title: Attended speaker paradigm (cEEGrid data)
description: This dataset comprises consolidated cEEGrid recordings from two attended speaker paradigm studies involving 36 participants (15 from Jaeger et al. 2020 and 21 from Holtze et al. 2021). Participants performed a dichotic listening task with competing audiobooks while instructed to attend to either the left or right speaker. The pooled dataset includes recordings under omnidirectional and beamforming acoustic conditions, providing a resource for investigating neural correlates of selective auditory attention using high-density EEG.
methods_description: Participants performed a two-competing speaker paradigm with 5-6 blocks of 10-minute audiobook presentations. In the omnidirectional condition, both audiobooks were presented at equal loudness. In the beamforming condition, the attended audiobook was presented louder than the ignored audiobook. cEEGrid recordings were acquired during these tasks.
